questionHtml:
The graph shows the variation with time of the velocity of an object. Error bars for velocity are included.

What is the percentage uncertainty for the velocity at time t = 4 s?


A.  ± 20 %

B.  ± 10 %

C.  ± 8 %

D.  ± 5 %

meta.title: The graph shows the variation with time of the velocity of an object. Error bars for velocity are included. What is the percentage uncertainty for the velocity at time t = 4 s? A.
